name: Central Udon / UD Town / rail-bus urban core
capture_notes: Primary Udon Thani urban retail, hotel, nightlife, and transport core. Good candidate for destination/urban DC charging if parking, access, and competition are understood.

name: Western Ring Road / Route 216
capture_notes: High AADT ring-road corridor with 31,736 AADT in 2566. Attractive for roadside hub and city bypass demand.

name: Eastern Ring Road / Route 216
capture_notes: Route 216 east-side ring road with 25,424 AADT in 2566. Needs POI/anchor and competitor verification.

name: Route 2 south gateway / Non Sa-at - Udon Thani
capture_notes: Intercity Bangkok-Khon Kaen-Udon flow on Route 2, with 28,629 AADT in 2566 south of Udon. Strong for travel stopover if site has highway access.

name: Route 22 Nong Kham - Nong Han axis
capture_notes: Highest 2566 Udon AADT point in seed data, 33,979 on Route 22. Important east/north-east corridor but may be less retail-destination oriented.

name: Udon Thani Airport / west city access
capture_notes: Airport, car rental, hotel, and west-city travel demand. DC demand depends on rental EV penetration and nearby public charger coverage.

name: Nong Prajak / expat-residential west city
capture_notes: Recreation, expat, residential and hotel demand. Better for urban destination charging than high-throughput corridor hub.
